name: Porche
description:
Porche is a member of the Foxy Pirates, and is considered an idol by the crew and is loved by all of the men.  She participates in the Donut Race. Her personality is like that of a very arrogant girl who lacks intelligence. She is very loyal to Foxy, but also has a huge obsession with Chopper since he's so cute. She refers to him as "Choppy", prefers for him to stay in his Brain Point form (When he turns into his Jumping Point form she yelled "What happened to Choppy?! That's not cute at all!)."  Her weapon is a baton-like weapon that shoots shurikens covered with flowers and, in the anime only, shoots out a purple gas (presumably some kind of knockout gas) that causes those hit by it to "blank out", leaving them helpless and can also hypnotize.    

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
